title: epidendrum vulcanicum
intro: Epidendrum vulcanicum, also known as the Vulcan's orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central America. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Its health benefits include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Epidendrum vulcanicum typically involve drying and infusing the leaves or roots in hot water to create a tea or decoction that can be consumed for medicinal purposes.
